creator: cstef@mail.ru
text:
The page at http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/cvs-src/ (the cvs-src archives search interface) says "The archive search index was last rebuilt at Sunday, 12 Mar 2006 19:21:26 PST. Any postings after that will not be found by a search. Index rebuild is usally done once every 24 hours for this list". And indeed, no postings after that date can be found when doing search from that page.
So either index rebuild is broken or statement about rebuilding every 24 hours should be deleted.

How-To-Repeat: Go to http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/cvs-src/ and try to search recent postings.
